Test Case Description: 1. Open /admin/login. 2. Enter valid credentials. 3. Submit. Expected: Redirect to /adminshivamdashboard; analytics tab visible; admin_session cookie set (HttpOnly).
1. Submit login with wrong password. Expected: Error message; no dashboard access; after 5 failures in 15 min, rate limit message.
Prerequisites: Wrong password available for test account

Test Case Description: 1. Visit /admin. 2. Visit /adminshivamdashboard. Expected: Both redirect to /admin/login.
Prerequisites: Logged out or incognito browser session

Test Case Description: 1. Visit /admin. Expected: Redirect to dashboard.
Prerequisites: Admin logged in with valid session

Test Case Description: 1. Logout from dashboard. 2. Refresh dashboard. 3. Call protected admin API. Expected: Redirect to login; subsequent admin API returns 401.
1. Attempt admin POST/PUT/DELETE without X-CSRF-Token. 2. Retry with token from GET /api/csrf-token. Expected: 403 CSRF error without token; request succeeds with valid token.

Test Case: No admin data on public routes
Test Case Description: 1. Browse /products and /orders without admin cookie. 2. Attempt GET /api/admin/*. Expected: No admin-only data exposed; admin API returns 401.

Test Case: Public cannot list orders by email
Test Case Description: 1. Call deprecated/public enumeration endpoints if documented. Expected: Blocked or 404/401 per security.test.ts.
1. Open /. Expected: Hero/carousel visible; View All Products navigates to /products.
1. Open /products. 2. Check header. Expected: Logo, Orders, and Cart visible; no standalone Products nav icon.
1. Open /products. 2. Scroll/load more if applicable. Expected: Products with prices; OOS badge when is_out_of_stock or stock === 0.
1. Use search/sort/price filters. 2. Open /products?q=keyword. Expected: Results match query; URL deep link applies search.

Test Case: Size required before add to cart
Test Case Description: 1. Open /product/{public_id}. 2. Click Add to Cart without selecting size. 3. Select size and retry. Expected: Button disabled or error without size; add succeeds after size selected.
1. Open OOS product page. Expected: OOS messaging; add disabled; sticky CTA hidden on mobile.
1. Open product with video_360. 2. Interact with viewer. Expected: MP4 plays/drags; placeholder copy if no video configured.
1. Open /shipping-policy. Expected: Shows $25 flat shipping and free over $200 (matches checkout).
1. Open /terms-of-service. Expected: Governing law shows Punjab, India.
1. Fetch /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt. Expected: Valid XML; product URLs present when API reachable.
1. Open /cart with empty cart. Expected: Empty message; link to continue shopping.
1. Add item from PDP. 2. Change quantity. 3. Remove line. Expected: Totals update; badge count in nav matches item count.
1. Change quantity. 2. Observe network tab. Expected: POST /api/products/validate-cart runs; prices refresh from server.
1. Break network or block API. 2. Change cart. 3. Click Retry validation. Expected: Error shown; retry recovers when online.
1. Open two tabs same origin. 2. Add item in tab A. Expected: Tab B cart updates via BroadcastChannel.
1. Admin marks product OOS. 2. Refresh cart validation on storefront. Expected: Line shows error; checkout blocked.
Prerequisites: Item in cart; admin access to toggle OOS

Test Case Description: 1. Open /checkout with empty cart. Expected: Redirect or empty-cart messaging.
1. Leave required fields blank. 2. Click Place Order. Expected: Toast — complete required fields plus first field hint.
1. Submit without policy checkbox. 2. Check box and submit. Expected: Blocked until accepted; succeeds after acceptance.
1. Open checkout form with items in cart. Expected: Country pre-selected to United States.
1. Enter valid coupon code. 2. Apply. Expected: Discount in summary; server pricing matches display.
1. Apply invalid code (e.g. INVALID). Expected: Error message; no discount applied.
1. Build cart with eligible and ineligible items. 2. Apply product-scoped coupon. Expected: Discount only on eligible lines per server totals.
1. Build cart with 2+ and 5+ item quantities. 2. Review totals. Expected: 10% at 2+ items; 20% at 5+ (before coupon).
1. Build cart with subtotal >= $200 merchandise before discounts. Expected: Shipping $0 in summary.
1. Alter displayed total via DevTools. 2. Place order. Expected: Server rejects mismatch (> $0.01).
1. Complete valid form and accept policy. 2. Click Place Order. 3. Observe redirect. Expected: Opens wa.me with order UUID, items, totals; cart clears on next navigation per sessionStorage flag.
Prerequisites: Valid form; policy accepted; WhatsApp number configured

Test Case Description: 1. Complete place-order flow. 2. Land on /payment/success if used. Expected: Order received confirmation displayed.
1. Open /payment/cancel. Expected: Checkout cancelled copy; cart preserved.
1. Rapid double-click Place Order. Expected: Single order created; duplicate idempotency key returns same payload.
1. Complete checkout on phone using http://192.168.x.x:5173. Expected: Place order succeeds (createClientId fallback for non-secure context).
Prerequisites: Phone on same LAN; HTTP dev server

Test Case Description: 1. Open /orders?orderId={uuid} from email link. Expected: Order ID field prefilled.
Prerequisites: Email with orderId query param link

Test Case Description: 1. Enter order UUID and checkout email. 2. Submit. Expected: Order status and line items shown.
Prerequisites: Placed order with known UUID and email

Test Case Description: 1. Submit lookup with valid UUID and wrong email. Expected: Order not found (uniform message).
1. Submit malformed order ID. Expected: Validation error or not found.
1. Complete successful lookup. 2. Reload page. Expected: Form empty; order details cleared.
1. Lookup shipped order with tracking URL. Expected: Tracking link visible and opens carrier URL.
Prerequisites: Admin marked order shipped with tracking URL

Test Case Description: 1. Follow legacy access-exchange URL if exists. Expected: 410 or safe error page.
Prerequisites: Legacy email link format if available

Test Case Description: 1. Submit empty form. 2. Submit with invalid email. Expected: Field validation errors shown.
1. Fill all fields with valid data. 2. Submit. Expected: wa.me opens with prefilled name/email/subject/message.
1. View contact page. Expected: Phone number matches VITE_WHATSAPP_CONTACT_NUMBER.
1. Grant analytics consent. 2. Submit contact form. 3. Check activity log or admin export. Expected: contact_submit logged; IP anonymized.
1. Open site in fresh session. 2. Accept all cookies. Expected: Banner hides; non-essential scripts allowed per policy.
1. Open site in fresh session. 2. Reject non-essential cookies. Expected: Essential-only storage applied.
1. Switch between day/week/month/year/all periods. Expected: Stats and charts update for each period.
Prerequisites: Admin logged in; seeded orders (npm run seed:test-data)

Test Case Description: 1. Set From/To dates. 2. Click Apply range. Expected: Dashboard reflects selected IST date range.
1. Change custom dates without Apply — verify export disabled. 2. Apply range then export. Expected: Export disabled until Apply; CSV downloads with expected columns.
Prerequisites: Admin logged in; custom period selected

Test Case Description: 1. Break network on analytics tab. 2. Click retry when restored. Expected: Error state shown; retry succeeds when network restored.
Prerequisites: Admin logged in; ability to simulate API failure

Test Case Description: 1. Open product modal. 2. Fill name, price, stock, image. 3. Save. Expected: Product appears in admin list and storefront after cache refresh.
1. Edit existing product fields. 2. Save. Expected: Changes persist on storefront.
1. Toggle OOS switch on in-stock product. Expected: Optimistic UI update; PUT /api/products/:id; storefront shows OOS.
1. Enable low-stock filter. Expected: Products with stock <= 5 units listed.
1. Adjust stock. 2. View movement history. Expected: Movement row with delta and timestamp recorded.
1. Select multiple products. 2. Apply bulk stock delta. Expected: All selected products update stock correctly.
1. Upload image <= 20 MB via admin. 2. Save product. Expected: Image URL serves correctly; oversized/broken upload rejected.
Prerequisites: Image file <= 20 MB; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Load more when >50 products exist. Expected: Next page appends without duplicates.
1. Search by UUID, order number, email, and customer name. Expected: Correct order found for each search type.
1. Open pending WhatsApp order. 2. Mark paid with payment_id and admin_note. Expected: payment_status=completed, status=processing; WhatsApp confirmation if Cloud API configured.
Prerequisites: Pending WhatsApp order; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Attempt mark paid without admin_note or payment_id. Expected: Validation error; order remains pending.
1. Move processing order to shipped with carrier, tracking, and tracking URL. Expected: Customer lookup shows tracking information.
1. Set estimated delivery date in order modal. 2. Save. Expected: Field persists on reload.
Prerequisites: Open order modal; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Edit customer/shipping on unpaid pending order via modal. Expected: Updates saved and visible on reload.
Prerequisites: Unpaid pending order; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Change qty, add, or remove line items on unpaid pending order. Expected: Totals recalculated; inventory adjusted.
Prerequisites: Unpaid pending order; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Cancel pending payment order. Expected: Order cancelled; stock restored; coupon released.
Prerequisites: Pending payment order; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Attempt to cancel paid/completed order. Expected: 403 or UI blocks action.
Prerequisites: Paid order exists; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Delete pending unpaid order. Expected: Row removed; stock and coupon restored.
Prerequisites: Pending unpaid order; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Select multiple orders. 2. Apply bulk status change. Expected: Valid transitions succeed; invalid transitions rejected.
1. Enter code, discount %, entire order scope. 2. Create. Expected: Coupon appears in list; works at checkout.
1. Set scope to specific products. 2. Pick products via search. 3. Create. Expected: Scope column shows product count; checkout applies only to those products.
1. Edit description, max uses, expiry, scope. 2. Save. Expected: Updates persist.
1. Deactivate active coupon. 2. Try at checkout. Expected: Inactive coupon rejected at validate endpoint.
1. Delete unused coupon. Expected: Coupon removed from list.
1. Navigate Next/Previous when >10 coupons exist. Expected: 10 coupons per page; pagination works.
1. Search for test. 2. Paginate results. Expected: Matching rows only; pagination works.
1. Add or edit admin note on customer. 2. Save. Expected: Note persists on reload.
1. Open View History. 2. Paginate orders (10/page). Expected: Customer orders listed correctly.
Prerequisites: Customer with order history; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Soft delete test customer. 2. Enable show deleted toggle. 3. Restore customer. Expected: Hidden by default; visible when show deleted enabled; restored customer visible again.
1. Export activity log as NDJSON with optional date range. Expected: Valid NDJSON file downloads.
Prerequisites: Activity logs exist; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. View active sessions. 2. Run expired session cleanup. Expected: Stale sessions removed from list.
Prerequisites: Active admin sessions; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Run customer aggregate recompute after bulk order changes. Expected: Customer aggregates match order data.
Prerequisites: Bulk order changes made; admin logged in

Test Case Description: 1. Send GET /api/health. Expected: success: true; database and Redis status reported.
Prerequisites: Backend running locally or on staging

Test Case Description: 1. POST /api/orders via curl or Postman. Expected: 410 Gone response.
1. POST /api/coupons/use via curl. Expected: 410 Gone response.
1. Send 21+ coupon validate requests within 15 minutes. Expected: 429 response after limit exceeded.
1. Submit 6+ failed admin login attempts. Expected: Rate limited after threshold.
Prerequisites: Wrong password; API or UI login

Test Case Description: 1. POST place-order without CSRF token. Expected: 403 Forbidden.
1. Place order on storefront. 2. Find in admin. 3. Mark paid. 4. Ship. 5. Customer lookup. Expected: Statuses consistent across modules; stock decremented then fulfilled.
1. Place order with coupon. 2. Cancel pending order. Expected: used_count not permanently incremented; coupon available again.
1. Edit product price in admin. 2. Validate cart on storefront. Expected: Storefront shows new price after validation.
1. Attempt refund or cancel on paid order via UI and API. Expected: Blocked everywhere (API 403).
1. Run node frontend/scripts/audit-form-labels.mjs from repo root. Expected: Output ends with count 0.
1. Open DevTools Issues tab. 2. Exercise /checkout, /contact, /orders, /products, and admin modals. Expected: No missing id/name or label association issues.
1. Open /checkout at 320px viewport width. Expected: Form usable; policy text not hidden under sticky bar.
Prerequisites: Items in cart; mobile viewport or device

Test Case Description: 1. Open orders and products tabs on phone viewport. Expected: Tables scroll horizontally; cards readable.
1. GET /api/admin/analytics without admin_session cookie. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.
Prerequisites: curl or Postman; no auth cookie

Test Case Description: 1. POST place-order with empty items array. Expected: 400 validation error.
1. Place order with quantity exceeding available stock. Expected: 409 Insufficient stock.
1. Enter SQL injection string in admin order search. Expected: Safe handling; no error leak or data corruption.
1. Attempt admin upload of file > 20 MB. Expected: Rejected with clear error message.
Prerequisites: Image file > 20 MB; admin logged in
